name: force-websearch-policy
description: Reusable Codex skill that instructs Codex to use web search and primary sources for current or source-grounded tasks.

interface.shortDescription: Encourages web search and citations for current/source-grounded Codex tasks.
interface.longDescription: A lightweight Codex skill bundle. This does not alter API payloads; use the CLIProxyAPI native plugin for request-level enforcement.
defaultPrompt: Use Force Web Search Policy while researching this issue.
Use Force Web Search Policy before changing dependencies or relying on current docs.
